record.field:
user_med_manager = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_med_manager', False) user_procurement = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_procurement', False) user_doctor = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_doctor', False) user_receptionist = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_receptionist', False) user_inventory = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_inventory', False) user_maintenance = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_maintenance', False)
emp_med_manager = env['hr.employee'].search([('user_id', '=', user_med_manager.id)], limit=1) if user_med_manager else None emp_procurement = env['hr.employee'].search([('user_id', '=', user_procurement.id)], limit=1) if user_procurement else None
if emp_med_manager: emp_med_manager.write({'name': 'Dr. Ahmad (Medical Manager)', 'job_title': 'Medical Operations Manager'})
doctor = env['hr.employee'].search([('user_id', '=', user_doctor.id)], limit=1) if user_doctor else None if doctor: doctor.write({'parent_id': emp_med_manager.id, 'name': 'Dr. Ola (Hospital Doctor)', 'job_title': 'Hospital Doctor'})
receptionist = env['hr.employee'].search([('user_id', '=', user_receptionist.id)], limit=1) if user_receptionist else None if receptionist: receptionist.write({'parent_id': emp_med_manager.id, 'name': 'Samer (Receptionist)', 'job_title': 'Receptionist'})
if emp_procurement: emp_procurement.write({'name': 'Eng. Sami (Procurement Manager)', 'job_title': 'Procurement Manager'})
inventory = env['hr.employee'].search([('user_id', '=', user_inventory.id)], limit=1) if user_inventory else None if inventory: inventory.write({'parent_id': emp_procurement.id, 'name': 'Fadi (Inventory Officer)', 'job_title': 'Inventory Officer'})
maintenance = env['hr.employee'].search([('user_id', '=', user_maintenance.id)], limit=1) if user_maintenance else None if maintenance: maintenance.write({'parent_id': emp_procurement.id, 'name': 'Tareq (Maintenance Technician)', 'job_title': 'Maintenance Tech'})
